sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ المُعَلِّمُ مِنَ الطُّلَّابِ كِتَابَةَ مَوْضُوعٍ قَصِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnik je zamolio učenike da napišu kratki sastav.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher asked the students to write a short essay.

sentences.translation: Zijad je pisao o svojoj porodici i kući.
sentences.translationEn: Ziad wrote about his family and home.

sentences.translation: Opisao je oca, majku i mlađeg brata.
sentences.translationEn: He described his father, mother, and younger brother.

sentences.translation: Stil je bio jasan a rečenice kratke.
sentences.translationEn: The style was clear and the sentences were short.

sentences.translation: Nastavnik mu je dao odličnu ocjenu.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher gave him an excellent grade.
